dialogue_text: Unless you wish me to assume the responsibility,
source_excerpt: "Unless you wish me to assume the responsibility," I said, smiling.

speaker.notes: First-person narration suggests John Carter as the speaker.

dialogue_text: Were you to give me your word that neither you nor Dejah Thoris would attempt to escape until after we have safely reached the court of Tal Hajus you might have the key and throw the chains into the river Iss.
source_excerpt: "Were you to give me your word that neither you nor Dejah Thoris would attempt to escape until after we have safely reached the court of Tal Hajus you might have the key and throw the chains into the river Iss."

speaker.notes: No canonical speaker could be inferred from the source context.

review_notes: Speaker could not be resolved from the source context.

dialogue_text: It were better that you held the key, Tars Tarkas,
source_excerpt: "It were better that you held the key, Tars Tarkas," I replied.

speaker.notes: First-person narration suggests John Carter as the speaker.
